# feedthejoe.com

> AI-facing index and structured data endpoints.

- Primary: https://feedthejoe.com/
- Dataset JSON: https://feedthejoe.com/site-dataset.json
- Dataset CSV: https://feedthejoe.com/site-dataset.csv
- SEO Health: https://feedthejoe.com/seo-health.json
- Entity Graph JSON: https://feedthejoe.com/entity-graph.json
- Entity Graph CSV: https://feedthejoe.com/entity-graph.csv
- XML Sitemap Index: https://feedthejoe.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Priority Sitemap: https://feedthejoe.com/sitemap-priority.xml
- Image Sitemap: https://feedthejoe.com/sitemap-image.xml
- HTML Sitemap: https://feedthejoe.com/sitemap.html
